rationale: Est. Code §309.051 governs probate inventory and appraisement of estate property. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote:
The inventory must:
(1) include:
(A) all estate real property located in this state; and
(B) all estate personal property regardless of where the property is located; and
_note: The cited rule concerns estate inventory procedures in probate; it does not reference homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13. No conflict identified.
